name: Black Stars
era: Era 13 — The Tower / Era 15 — The Kingdom Age
known_facts: Associated with the Black Stars Tower, which "hears first."
The premier scientific civilization of the future; not defined primarily by military power (Kemi, 2026-06-25).
Built on curiosity, instrumentation, observation, verification, and exploration; "Knowledge — not conquest — is their greatest achievement" (Kemi, 2026-06-25).

Their breakthrough technology began with a single physical principle (space-time geometry) quietly transferred by an unnamed ancient alien presence several generations before the main UMADA storyline; the Black Stars spent decades developing it into usable technology themselves (Kemi, 2026-06-25).
Became the first civilization capable of routine scientific expeditions beyond Neptune, in an era named "The Kuiper Belt Renaissance" (Kemi, 2026-06-25).
Scientific philosophy: "Every better instrument creates a better civilization." Observation precedes understanding; understanding precedes action (Kemi, 2026-06-25).
Instrumentation culture: celebrate scientists, engineers, instrument builders, observers, archivists, and explorers rather than warriors (Kemi, 2026-06-25).
note: Tower link is locked. Full civilization profile (history, philosophy, named sensors, Earth Sensors Lab and Omoluabi connections): `01_canon/BLACK_STARS_CIVILIZATION.md`. Specific institutions, laboratories, exploration vessels, and additional terminology are not yet named in source canon — not invented; see that file's "Open fields" and `01_canon/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md`.
